subcodes.first_line: O thou my spiritual son! Thy letter was received. Thou hast written that a few persons have become the cause of the confusion of thoughts in that city… With the utmost resolution and constancy call the souls to the Kingdom… In this day, to serve the Cause of God is to engender love and fellowship amongst His friends
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای پسر روحانی من نامه های شما رسید مرقوم نموده بودید که بعضی از نفوس سبب
subcodes.subjects: @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @role of the Covenant in preserving unity
